attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ST.BATCH_ID, 
ST.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST.ACTION_CODE,
ST.ADJUSTMENT_REASON,
ST.ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,
ST.AMOUNT,
ST.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
ST.AP_VALIDATION_ERROR,
ST.ATTENDEES,
ST.ATTRIBUTE1,
ST.ATTRIBUTE10,
ST.ATTRIBUTE11,
ST.ATTRIBUTE12,
ST.ATTRIBUTE13,
ST.ATTRIBUTE14,
ST.ATTRIBUTE15,
ST.ATTRIBUTE2,
ST.ATTRIBUTE3,
ST.ATTRIBUTE4,
ST.ATTRIBUTE5,
ST.ATTRIBUTE6,
ST.ATTRIBUTE7,
ST.ATTRIBUTE8,
ST.ATTRIBUTE9,
ST.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
ST.AVG_MILEAGE_RATE,
ST.AWARD_ID,
ST.AWARD_NUMBER,
ST.AWT_GROUP_ID,
ST.CATEGORY_CODE,
ST.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
ST.COMPANY_PREPAID_INVOICE_ID,
ST.COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY,
ST.CREATED_BY,
ST.CREATION_DATE,
ST.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID,
ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
ST.DAILY_AMOUNT,
ST.DAILY_DISTANCE,
ST.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT1,
ST.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT2,
ST.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT3,
ST.DESTINATION_FROM,
ST.DESTINATION_TO,
ST.DISTANCE_UNIT_CODE,
ST.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
ST.END_EXPENSE_DATE,
ST.EXCHANGE_DATE,
ST.EXCHANGE_RATE,
ST.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
ST.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,
ST.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,
ST.EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
ST.EXPENSE_GROUP,
ST.FLEX_CONCATENATED,
ST.FLIGHT_NUMBER,
ST.FUEL_TYPE,
ST.FUNC_CURRENCY_AMT,
ST.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
ST.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
ST.GLOBAL_NAME,
ST.ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,
ST.ITEMIZE_ID,
ST.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
ST.JUSTIFICATION,
ST.JUSTIFICATION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ST.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
ST.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER,
ST.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
ST.LOCATION,
ST.LOCATION_ID,
ST.LOCATION_TO_ID,
ST.MERCHANT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER,
ST.MERCHANT_NAME,
ST.MERCHANT_REFERENCE,
ST.MERCHANT_TAXPAYER_ID,
ST.MERCHANT_TAX_REG_NUMBER,
ST.MILEAGE_RATE_ADJUSTED_FLAG,
ST.NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
ST.NUMBER_PEOPLE,
ST.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS1,
ST.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS2,
ST.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS3,
ST.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS1,
ST.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS2,
ST.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS3,
ST.NUM_FREE_DINNERS1,
ST.NUM_FREE_DINNERS2,
ST.NUM_FREE_DINNERS3,
ST.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES1,
ST.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES2,
ST.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES3,
ST.NUM_PDM_DAYS1,
ST.NUM_PDM_DAYS2,
ST.NUM_PDM_DAYS3,
ST.ORG_ID,
ST.PA_INTERFACED_FLAG,
ST.PA_QUANTITY,
ST.PER_DIEM_RATE1,
ST.PER_DIEM_RATE2,
ST.PER_DIEM_RATE3,
ST.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
ST.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,
ST.PROJECT_ID,
ST.PROJECT_NAME,
ST.PROJECT_NUMBER,
ST.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
ST.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
ST.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
ST.RECEIPT_MISSING_FLAG,
ST.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
ST.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
ST.REFERENCE_1,
ST.REFERENCE_2,
ST.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
ST.REPORT_LINE_ID,
ST.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
ST.START_EXPENSE_DATE,
ST.STAT_AMOUNT,
ST.SUBMITTED_AMOUNT,
ST.TASK_ID,
ST.TASK_NAME,
ST.TASK_NUMBER,
ST.TAX_CODE_ID,
ST.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
ST.TICKET_CLASS_CODE,
ST.TICKET_NUMBER,
ST.TRAVEL_TYPE,
ST.TRIP_DISTANCE,
ST.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
ST.USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT,
ST.VAT_CODE,
ST.VEHICLE_CATEGORY_CODE,
ST.VEHICLE_TYPE, 
ST.WEB_PARAMETER_ID,
'RI' asEXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS ST  /* where coalesce(ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,0) <> -1 */ 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON ST.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE WERL
WHERE ST.REPORT_LINE_ID=WERL.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WERL.BK_SS_CD)

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SRC.GLOBAL_NAME,SRC.REPORT_LINE_ID) + MAX_VAL EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
	SRC.REPORT_LINE_ID SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT, SRC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE BK_SS_CD, USER EDW_CREATE_USER, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
FROM
	  (
		SELECT ST.REPORT_LINE_ID,N_SSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,ST.GLOBAL_NAME
		FROM
		(SELECT REPORT_LINE_ID, GLOBAL_NAME
			FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS /* where coalesce(ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,0) <> -1  */
		) ST ,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SSC
		WHERE ST.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
	   )  SRC,
             (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
		from $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE) SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE
WHERE
    NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE
			WHERE SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.BK_SS_CD=SRC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AND
			     SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT = SRC.REPORT_LINE_ID)

SELECT
	SM_ERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY ,
	ST_EX.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_NUM_INT,
	SM_ERL.BK_SS_CD,
	ST_EX.CURRENCY_CODE,
	ST_EX.EXCHANGE_DATE ,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,'=') AS RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
	ST_EX.MERCHANT_NAME,
	ST_EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
	ST_EX.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
	ST_EX.VAT_CODE,
	ST_EX.EXCHANGE_RATE,
	ST_EX.CREATION_DATE ,
	coalesce( CRT_WRK_PTY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999),
	coalesce( UPD_WRK_PTY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999),
	COALESCE(PRMS.WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT, PRMS.PROMPT,'=') AS ER_LINE_TYPE_CD,
	ST_EX.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE2,'=') AS ATTRIBUTE2,
	ST_EX.ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,
	ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE3,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,'=') AS TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,'=') AS AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.START_EXPENSE_DATE, CAST (Current_TimeStamp(0) AS TIMeSTAMP(0) ) ) AS ER_LINE_EXPENSE_INCURRED_DTM,
	ST_EX.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
	ST_EX.JUSTIFICATION,
	ST_EX.NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,'=') AS POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
	ST_EX.AMOUNT ,
	ST_EX.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
	ST_EX.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,'=') AS RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ST_EX.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK'),
	ST_EX.REPORT_LINE_ID,     
	N_ER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,
	ST_EX.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
    CASE WHEN (EL_ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG')
                                     THEN -999
                  WHEN (EL_ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA')
                                             THEN -998
          ELSE EL_ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
    END AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
    ST_EX.CATEGORY_CODE,
     COALESCE(EL_ENGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK') BK_COMPANY_CODE,
     COALESCE(EL_ENGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,'UNKNOW') BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
     COALESCE(EL_ENGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE,'UNKNOW') BK_PROJECT_CODE,
     COALESCE(EL_ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,'UNKNO') BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
     COALESCE(EL_ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,'UNK') BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
     COALESCE(EL_ENGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,'UNK') BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	     ST_EX.ACTION_CODE,
     'I' AS DML_TYPE,
                ST_EX.DAILY_AMOUNT,
                case when coalesce(ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,0) <>  -1 then 'ITEMIZATION' else  'SUMMARY' end as ER_LINE_TYPE,
                COALESCE( ERL_PARENT.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY ,-999 ) AS RU_SMRY_EXPENSE_REPORT_LN_KEY,
                (CASE WHEN PRMS.WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT IN ('Comm-Home Internet-Service','Comm-Home Internet-Service FR','Comm-Home Internet-Service UK','Comm-Home Internet-Service NL','Temporary HIA Usage','Comm-Monthly Mobile-New Hire','Comm-SIM/Prepaid-Mobile','Comm-Mobile Phone Usage') THEN  COALESCE(ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE6, 'UNKNOWN' ) ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS BK_EXPENSE_LN_SVC_PRVDR_NAME,
                (CASE WHEN PRMS.WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT in ('Other-Reward to Employee','Other-Gifts to Employees','Other-Gift to Employees') THEN (CASE WHEN  ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE4  is NOT NULL THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END) ELSE 'N'   END)  AS EMP_RECOG_ROLE,
                (CASE WHEN ST_EX.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_ROLE,
                (CASE WHEN PRMS.WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT  in ('Other-Reward to Employee','Other-Gifts to Employees','Other-Gift to Employees') THEN  ( CASE WHEN  ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE5='null' THEN  -999     ELSE COALESCE(ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE5, -999)  END) ELSE -999 END) RU_REWARDED_EMP_CNT,
                 COALESCE(EAC.SIC_CODE,'UNKNOW') AS RU_MERCHANT_SIC_CD,  /* Changed the default value from ‘UNKNOWN’ to ‘UNKNOW’ due to the record drop in reports when joined to N_SIC_CODE table */ 
                (CASE WHEN PRMS.WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT in ('Other-Reward to Employee','Other-Gifts to Employees','Other-Gift to Employees') THEN   COALESCE( ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE4, 'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN'   END) AS RU_BK_EMP_RECOG_REWARD_TYPE_CD,
                (CASE WHEN PRMS.WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT  in ('AirTravelCustomer(non-PubSec)',
'HotelCustomer(non-PubSec)',
'GroundTransCustmer(non-PubSec)',
'MealsCustomer(non-PubSec)',
'ConferenceCustomer(non-PubSec)',
'EntertainCustomer(non-PubSec)',
'GiftCustomer(non-PubSec)',
'PubSec(non-US)Entertainment',
'PubSect(US)Entertainment',
'PubSec(US)AirTravel',
'PubSec(non-US)Air Travel',
'PubSec(non-US)Hotel',
'PubSec(US)Hotel',
'PubSec(non-US)GroundTrans',
'PubSec(US)GroundTrans',
'PubSect(non-US)BusinessMeal',
'PubSect(US)BusinessMeal',
'PubSec(non-US)Gift',
'PubSec(US)Gift',
'PubSec(non-US)Conference',
'PubSec(US)Conference',
'Air Travel-Public Sector Customer',
'Air Travel-Public Sector Customer Guest',
'Air Travel-Public Sector Guest',
'Air Travel-PubSec Non-US Guest',
'Air Travel-PubSec US Guest',
'Ground Tran-PubSec NonUS Guest',
'Ground Trans-Public Sector Guest',
'Ground Trans-PublicSector Guest',
'Ground Trans-PublicSector/Cust',
'Ground Trans-PubSec US Guest',
'Ground Trans-PubSector/Cust',
'Hotel-Room & Tax-Public Sector',
'Hotel-Room & Tax-Public Sector Guest',
'Hotel-Room&Tax-PubSec US Guest',
'Hotel-Room&Tx-PbSec NonUSGuest',
'Meals-Enter-PubSec Non-USGuest',
'Meals-Entertain-Public Sector',
'Meals-Entertain-Public Sector Guest',
'Meals-Entertmt-PubSec US Guest',
'Other-Gifts PubSec NonUS Guest',
'Other-Gifts PubSec US Guest',
'Other-Gifts to Pub Sector Guest',
'Other-Gifts to Public Sector',
'Other-Gifts to Public Sector Guest',
'Other-Mtg/Events-PublicSec-DEU',
'Other-Mtgs/Events-PublicSector',
'Other-Reg/Con -PubSec US Guest',
'Other-Reg/Conf Fees-Public Sec',
'Other-Reg/Conf Fees-Public Sec Guest',
'Other-Reg/Conf Fees-Public Sec Guest Guest',
'Other-Reg/Conf Fees-Public Sector Guest',
'Other-Reg/Con-PbSec NonUSGuest') THEN COALESCE(ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE6, 'UNKNOWN' ) ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS GIFT_OR_ENTERTAINMENT_ID,
CAST ( ST_EX.END_EXPENSE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) AS EXPENSE_END_DTM,
CAST ( ST_EX.END_EXPENSE_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) DV_EXPENSE_END_DT,
COALESCE(ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN') as ACTIVITY_TYPE_DESCR,
---Newly added column----------
ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE12 as PENDING_YOUR_RESOLUTION_LN_CD
FROM
        (
          SELECT 
                 ST_AERL.CURRENCY_CODE,
                 ST_AERL.EXCHANGE_DATE,
                 ST_AERL.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
                 ST_AERL.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER ,
                 ST_AERL.MERCHANT_NAME,
                 ST_AERL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                 ST_AERL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
                 ST_AERL.VAT_CODE,
                 ST_AERL.EXCHANGE_RATE,
                 ST_AERL.CREATION_DATE,
                 COALESCE(ST_AERL.CREATED_BY,-999) AS DD_CREATED_BY,
                 ST_AERL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
                 ST_AERL.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
                 ST_AERL.ATTRIBUTE1,
                 ST_AERL.ATTRIBUTE2,
                 ST_AERL.ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,
                 ST_AERL.ATTRIBUTE3,
                 ST_AERL.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
                 ST_AERL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
                 ST_AERL.START_EXPENSE_DATE,
                 ST_AERL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
                 ST_AERL.JUSTIFICATION,
                 ST_AERL.NUMBER_ATTENDEES AS NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
                 ST_AERL.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
                 ST_AERL.AMOUNT ,
                 ST_AERL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
                 ST_AERL.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
                 ST_AERL.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
                 ST_AERL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
                 ST_AERL.REPORT_LINE_ID AS REPORT_LINE_ID,
                 ST_AERL.GLOBAL_NAME,
                 ST_AERL.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
                 'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
                 ST_AERL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
                 ST_AERL.CATEGORY_CODE,
                 ST_AERL.WEB_PARAMETER_ID,
                 ST_AERL.PROJECT_ID,
                 ST_AERL.ATTRIBUTE4,
                 ST_AERL.ATTRIBUTE5 ,
                 ST_AERL.ATTRIBUTE6,       
                 ST_AERL.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID,
                 ST_AERL.ACTION_CODE,
                 'I' AS DML_TYPE,
                 DAILY_AMOUNT    ,
				 ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,
                 ST_AERL.END_EXPENSE_DATE,
				 ST_AERL.ATTRIBUTE12
           FROM
                 $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS ST_AERL 
                                                                 /* where coalesce(ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,0) <> -1  */
               UNION ALL
                 SELECT 
                 EX_AERL.CURRENCY_CODE,
                 EX_AERL.EXCHANGE_DATE,
                 EX_AERL.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
                 EX_AERL.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER  AS DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
                 EX_AERL.MERCHANT_NAME,
                 EX_AERL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                 EX_AERL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
                 EX_AERL.VAT_CODE,
                 EX_AERL.EXCHANGE_RATE,
                 EX_AERL.CREATION_DATE,
                 COALESCE(EX_AERL.CREATED_BY,-999) AS DD_CREATED_BY,
                 EX_AERL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
                 EX_AERL.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
                 EX_AERL.ATTRIBUTE1,
                 EX_AERL.ATTRIBUTE2,
                 EX_AERL.ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,
                 EX_AERL.ATTRIBUTE3,
                 EX_AERL.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
                 EX_AERL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
                 EX_AERL.START_EXPENSE_DATE,
                 EX_AERL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
                 EX_AERL.JUSTIFICATION,
                 EX_AERL.NUMBER_ATTENDEES  AS NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
                 EX_AERL.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
                 EX_AERL.AMOUNT ,
                 EX_AERL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
                 EX_AERL.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
                 EX_AERL.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
                 EX_AERL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
                 EX_AERL.REPORT_LINE_ID  AS REPORT_LINE_ID,
                 EX_AERL.GLOBAL_NAME,
                 EX_AERL.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
                'N'AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
                 EX_AERL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
                 EX_AERL.CATEGORY_CODE,  
                 EX_AERL.WEB_PARAMETER_ID,
                 EX_AERL.PROJECT_ID,    
                 EX_AERL.ATTRIBUTE4,
                 EX_AERL.ATTRIBUTE5,  
                 EX_AERL.ATTRIBUTE6,                                       
                 EX_AERL.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID,
                 EX_AERL.ACTION_CODE,      
                 'I' AS DML_TYPE,
				EX_AERL.DAILY_AMOUNT  ,
				ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,
				EX_AERL.END_EXPENSE_DATE,
				EX_AERL.ATTRIBUTE12
           FROM
                 $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS EX_AERL
           /* where coalesce(ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,0) <> -1  */
        ) ST_EX
                INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD 
                    ON  ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
                INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE SM_ERL
                     ON  ST_EX.REPORT_LINE_ID  = SM_ERL.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT 
                         AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SM_ERL.BK_SS_CD 
                 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT N_ER 
                    ON   ST_EX.REPORT_HEADER_ID =N_ER.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT 
               AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = N_ER.BK_SS_CD 
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$WORKDB.WI_CISCO_WORKER_KEY CRT_WRK_PTY
                    ON ST_EX.DD_CREATED_BY=CRT_WRK_PTY.USER_ID
                       AND ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME = CRT_WRK_PTY.GLOBAL_NAME
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$WORKDB.WI_CISCO_WORKER_KEY UPD_WRK_PTY
                    ON ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME = UPD_WRK_PTY.GLOBAL_NAME
               AND ST_EX.LAST_UPDATED_BY = UPD_WRK_PTY.USER_ID  
         LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
                                  SELECT REPORT_LINE_ID,EL_DIST.GLOBAL_NAME,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ENGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
                                                                ENGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE, ENGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE, ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
                                                                ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,ENGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
                                           FROM 
                                                    (
                     SELECT REPORT_LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,MIN(CODE_COMBINATION_ID) CODE_COMBINATION_ID FROM  
                       (SELECT REPORT_LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME, CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
                         FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_EXP_REPORT_DISTS_ALL
                       UNION ALL 
                       SELECT REPORT_LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
                       FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_EXP_REPORT_DISTS_DELS where (REPORT_LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ) not in ( select REPORT_LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME from $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_EXP_REPORT_DISTS_ALL  ) ) EL_DISTT
                     GROUP BY 1,2) EL_DIST                                                  
                                                                  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
                                             ON  EL_DIST.GLOBAL_NAME = ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME 
                                   AND EL_DIST.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ) EL_ENGLA
            ON ST_EX.REPORT_LINE_ID=EL_ENGLA.REPORT_LINE_ID AND
                ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME=EL_ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME                                  
         INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS PRMS 
                    ON ST_EX.WEB_PARAMETER_ID = PRMS.PARAMETER_ID
               AND ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME = PRMS.GLOBAL_NAME 
                        AND (ST_EX.PROJECT_ID IS NULL OR 
                        (ST_EX.PROJECT_ID IS NOT NULL AND PRMS.PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPE IS NOT NULL))
                LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE  ERL_PARENT
                           ON ( ST_EX.ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID  = ERL_PARENT.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT 
                                                                                AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = ERL_PARENT.BK_SS_CD 
                                                                  )
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EMP_RECOG_REWARD_TYPE NERT
                            ON(NERT.BK_EMP_RECOG_REWARD_TYPE_CD=COALESCE(ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN')
                                                                AND NERT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N')
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_LINE_SVC_PRVDR NELSP
                             ON (NELSP.BK_EXPENSE_LN_SVC_PRVDR_NAME =COALESCE(ST_EX.ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNOWN') AND NELSP.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N')
                LEFT OUTER JOIN(SELECT SIC.SIC_CODE, TRX_ID FROM
                                                                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_MF_AP_CRT_CARD_TRXNS_ALL EACC
                                                                                INNER JOIN(SELECT BK_SIC_CD AS SIC_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SIC_CODE WHERE BK_SIC_CD <> 'UNKNOW') SIC
                                                                                                                ON (CAST(SIC.SIC_CODE AS INTEGER)=EACC.SIC_CODE) group by 1,2) EAC
                                                                ON(ST_EX.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID=EAC.TRX_ID)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SM_ERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,ST_EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
ORDER BY     ST_EX. SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,ST_EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE   DESC) = 1
